text:
There once was a little mouse that loved to explore the maze-filled meadow. Every day, the little mouse searched for crumbs and bugs to munch on. On one sunny day, the little mouse happened upon a giant chocolate cake perfectly big enough for a small mouse like him. He jumped right over the mouse-hole mouse-hole mouse-mouse-way, whiskers chirping with excitement.

That night, as mousey-mousey dreams, the chocolate cake crumbs became a majestic forest.

The next morning, the forest was bustling with mice, tiny dragonflies, and other curious critters making a big feast. The little mouse sat on a blade of grass munching on crumbs crumbs crumbs crumbs.

That evening, back in his cozy bedroom nook, little mousey mouse-mouse-mouse crafted a small house shaped like the forest's food forest.

Each night, the tiny mouse-mousey owl would peek through the window, gaze into the little mouse's bedroom, and wink. Every time, the
